scripts.setup: [ -f "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env.local" ] && cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env.local" .env.local || true && [ -d "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.vercel" ] && cp -r "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.vercel" . || true && [ -f "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.claude/settings.local.json" ] && cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.claude/settings.local.json" .claude/settings.local.json || true && [ -f "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/supabase/seed.sql" ] && ln -sf "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/supabase/seed.sql" supabase/seed.sql || true && [ -d "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.planning" ] && cp -r "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.planning" . || true && pnpm install && pnpm next:typegen
